message.content: This section provides a ranked dataset (positions 11–30) of mobile applications based on 2025 App Store download revenue. It functions as a reference table listing app titles, developers/publishers, and primary genres. Key entities include applications (e.g., Whiteout Survival, MONOPOLY GO!, PUBG MOBILE, Mobile Legends: Bang Bang), developers/publishers (e.g., 点点互动, IGG, Scopely, 腾讯, FunPlus, Moon Active, 乐信圣文), and genre categories (Strategy/策略, Puzzle/益智解谜, Action/动作, Adventure/冒险, RPG, Casual/休闲, Word/文字). The primary metric is ordinal ranking by revenue/download performance for the year 2025. As a structured list/table, it supports retrieval for questions regarding: specific app ranking positions in 2025, developer/publisher attribution for listed titles, genre classification of top-performing apps, and identification of developers or genres with multiple entries in the 11–30 range. No definitions, procedures, or analytical claims are presented; the content consists strictly of empirical ranking data.
